installCommand: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd docs-site && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
buildCommand: npm run build --workspace=site && cd docs-site && npm run build && mkdir -p .vitepress/dist/playground && cp -r ../site/dist/. .vitepress/dist/playground/

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' blob: 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; worker-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net
